depression.description: I often feel like my friends don't really understand what I'm going through. It's frustrating because I want to connect, but I end up feeling more isolated.
Adjusting my SSRI medication has been really stressful. I feel like I'm in a constant state of uncertainty about whether it's helping or making things worse.
Every time I try to talk to someone about my feelings, it feels like they just don't get it. I end up feeling sad and disappointed, and I withdraw more.
Sometimes, it feels like I'm just stuck in this cycle of depression. No matter what I do, I can't seem to break free or feel better.
When I can't even do simple tasks, I feel so guilty and angry with myself. It's like I'm failing at everything, and that just makes my depression worse.
I can't shake the feeling that I'm unlovable and destined to be alone. It's a heavy thought that weighs on me constantly.
